wikitext:
'''Underdocks''' is one of two possible first {{2|Acts}} in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. The other possible Act 1 is {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Overview == Underdocks is one of the first acts of the game. The act spans 15 rooms, with the first 3 encounters drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. == Events == === Exclusive Events === * {{E|Abyssal Baths|2}} * {{E|Doors of Light and Dark|2}} * {{E|Drowning Beacon|2}} * {{E|Endless Conveyor|2}} * {{E|Punch Off|2}} * {{E|Spiraling Whirlpool|2}} * {{E|Sunken Treasury|2}} * {{E|Trash Heap|2}} * {{E|Waterlogged Scriptorium|2}} === Shared Events === * {{E|Brain Leech|2}} * {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} * {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} * {{E|Slippery Bridge|2}} * {{E|The Future of Potions?|2}} * {{E|The Legends Were True|2}} * {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} * {{E|This or That?|2}} == Monsters == The following monsters debut in the Underdocks:

=== First 3 Encounters === The first 3 encounters are drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. 3 of the 4 possible encounters are selected each run, each with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 250px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Corpse Slug Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Corpse Slug]][[File:Corpse Slug
